plugins.name: recoup-skills
plugins.description: Every Recoup skill in one install — a record label in a box: artist setup & API access, music-industry research, catalog deal review, content creation, song audio analysis, and end-to-end release campaigns, plus Recoup's internal engineering & ops tooling. Portable across agents; also installable via `npx skills add recoupable/skills`.

interface.shortDescription: A record label in a box — every Recoup skill in one install
interface.longDescription: The whole Recoup platform as a single plugin: artist setup & API access, music-industry research, catalog deal review, content creation, song audio analysis, and end-to-end release campaigns — every skill, agent, and hook in one bundle. Also ships Recoup's internal engineering & ops skills (gated behind the recoup-internal trigger keyword). General skills work for anyone; platform skills integrate with the Recoupable platform.
